requested_items.notes: Stable integrated legality checkpoint. The sigmoid-enabled nm1 block passes build_generator, generate_block_rtl, and 1_1_yosys_canonicalize, but this item is not itself physical-metrics evidence.
The next synth stage (1_2_yosys) still timed out on the full-top target, confirming that the original integrated proof target remained too large.
The direct yosys_stats_prefilter side path failed immediately due to an implementation bug and was backed out; it is not accepted evidence.
Accepted integrated reduced-proxy physical source from merged PR #74. This is the first architecture_block physical result suitable to ground the downstream Layer 2 activation-family work.

next_required_item.notes: This proposal is closed by merged PR #74; the next work moves to prop_l2_mapper_terminal_activation_family_v1.
